task:
AGENT RECENT MEMORY (do NOT duplicate these):
(none yet)

===== SESSION SIGNAL (20 tool calls) =====
USER: what happened with the InnerScope Xero bulk import
ASSISTANT: PITFALL: bulk-importing thousands of InnerScope (INND, public company) transactions without staging silently posted duplicate related-party entries; the fix is always staging + review before posting to a public-company org, never blind bulk-write. Also noted a company-wide fact: Container Apps Jobs environment otchealth-jobs-env has no Log Analytics attached, so diagnosing a failed replica requires reproducing the script locally instead of reading logs.
rubric: Extracts the staging-before-bulk-post pitfall for public-company (INND) writes as a durable lesson
Extracts the Log Analytics gap as a separate, generally-useful (shareable) fact/pitfall
Does NOT mark the INND-specific financial pitfall as share=true if it could expose MNPI-adjacent detail, while the generic infra fact (no Log Analytics) is safe to share
